# Hydrochemical_Analysis

**Summary**: The chemical analysis of groundwater to determine the concentration of major ions and dissolved solids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1992-hassan|Hassan, 1992]] used hydrochemical_analysis to characterize the mineral content and evolution of water in the Alat and Khobar aquifers.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a strong linear relationship between TDS and EC (r'=0.93) in the Alat aquifer. ([[1992-hassan|Hassan, 1992, p. 56]])
